items.title: South Korea's runaway wolf finally captured after nine-day search
items.dek: The search has been marked by twists and turns, gripping South Korea and even inspiring a meme coin.
items.body: The search has been marked by twists and turns, gripping South Korea and even inspiring a meme coin.

items.title: Singer D4vd arrested in connection with death of missing teen girl
items.dek: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.
items.body: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.

items.title: Messick loses no-hit bid in 9th; Guardians hold on
items.dek: Guardians rookie Parker Messick's bid for MLB's first no-hitter of 2026 was broken up in the ninth inning, but Cleveland held on for a 4-2 win over the Orioles
items.body: Guardians rookie Parker Messick's bid for MLB's first no-hitter of 2026 was broken up in the ninth inning, but Cleveland held on for a 4-2 win over the Orioles on Thursday night.
items.author: IriLine Desk
